name: Ask Nathan a strategy question
description: Jed wants Nathan's take on a non-irreversible strategic question — pricing, sequencing, scope, audience positioning, etc. Solomon proxies the question with full master context loaded.
trigger_examples: ask nathan what he thinks about pricing the book at $9 vs $19
what would nathan say about launching tradequote before ironedit ships
get nathan's read on whether to push affiliate apps this week
prompt_template: Pass {{question}} through consultNathan() with: task='strategy_question', confidence=0.7, context='Jed asked: {{question}}. Full master context attached.', proposed_action=null, question={{question}}, categories=[]. Return Nathan's reasoning + recommendation verbatim to Jed.
escalation_conditions: question implies a financial/legal/irreversible move — Nathan will short-circuit to escalate_to_jed
question is about Tasia or the kids — escalate

smoke_test.trigger_message: ask nathan what he thinks about pricing the book at $9 vs $19

notes: Use sparingly — every Nathan consult is an API spend hit. The dispatcher already auto-consults Nathan for any template in the 0.60-0.85 confidence band; this template is for Jed explicitly asking for Nathan's input.
